zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Bourbon於大約1235年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特時，她的父親Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX32歲，母親Yolande de CHATILLON18歲。她於1247年與Jean de Bourgogne結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1287年9月21日在義大利普格利亞霍治亞享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de Bourbon于大约1235年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特时，她的父亲Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX32岁，母亲Yolande de CHATILLON18岁。她于1247年与Jean de Bourgogne结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1287年9月21日在意大利普格利亞霍治亞享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Bourbon was born about 1235, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX, was 32 and her mother, Yolande de CHATILLON, was 18. She married Jean de Bourgogne in 1247. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 21 September 1287, in Foggia, Puglia, Italy, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Bourbon est née environ 1235, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Yolande de CHATILLON, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Bourgogne en 1247. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 21 septembre 1287, à Foggia, Puglia, Italie, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Bourbon um 1235 in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX 32 und ihre Mutter Yolande de CHATILLON 18. Sie hat 1247 Jean de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. September 1287 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Foggia, Puglia, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Bourbon è nata il circa 1235 nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Yolande de CHATILLON, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Bourgogne nel 1247. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 21 settembre 1287, nel Foggia, Puglia, Italia, all'età di 53 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Bourbon(이)가 대략 1235년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de CHATILLON(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1247년 Jean de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1287년 9월 21일 이탈리아 푸그리야 포지아에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Bourbon nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de CHATILLON, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Bourgogne em 1247. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 21 de setembro de 1287, em Foggia, Puglia, Itália, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Bourbon родилась около 1235 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Yolande de CHATILLON, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Bourgogne в 1247 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 21 сентября 1287 г. в местности фогя, пугля, Италия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Bourbon nació aproximadamente 1235, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Yolande de CHATILLON, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Jean de Bourgogne en 1247. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 21 de septiembre de 1287, en Foggia, Puglia, Italia, a la edad de 53 años.
